requirement_topic.en: ECA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ECA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ECA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain an ECA type approval certificate from the Ethiopian Communications Authority before importation or sale in Ethiopia, under the Communications Service Proclamation No. 1148/2019 and associated type approval directives. The ECA type approval certificate must be obtained before customs clearance. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by the ECA. Ethiopia's telecoms sector was liberalised in 2021 (Safaricom granted a licence alongside state-owned Ethio Telecom), increasing demand for certified equipment.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据《通信服务公告》第1148/2019号及相关型式批准指令，在进口或于埃塞俄比亚销售前取得埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）颁发的型式批准证书。ECA型式批准证书须在清关前取得。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被ECA视为等同认可。埃塞俄比亚电信市场于2021年自由化（Safaricom获得牌照，与国有埃塞电信共存），推动了对认证设备的需求增长。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據《通訊服務公告》第1148/2019號及相關型式批准指令，在進口或於埃塞俄比亞銷售前取得埃塞俄比亞通訊管理局（ECA）頒發的型式批准證書。ECA型式批准證書須在清關前取得。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被ECA視為等同認可。埃塞俄比亞電信市場於2021年自由化（Safaricom獲得牌照，與國有埃塞電信共存），推動了對認證設備的需求增長。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Communications Authority (ECA) Type Approval Directives

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 9254, GB 17625 for EMC; GB 4943 for safety) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Ethiopian Communications Authority.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 9254、GB 17625电磁兼容；GB 4943安全）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在埃塞俄比亚通信管理局不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 9254、GB 17625電磁相容；GB 4943安全）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在埃塞俄比亞通訊管理局不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate ECA type approval certificate required from the Ethiopian Communications Authority under Proclamation No. 1148/2019. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted by ECA. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Ethiopia. Type approval must be obtained before import or sale.
gap.zh: 须另行取得埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）依据第1148/2019号公告颁发的强制性型式批准证书。ECA不接受CE、FCC和CCC批准。SRRC和NAL在埃塞俄比亚不具法律效力。型式批准须在进口或销售前取得。
gap.zht: 須另行取得埃塞俄比亞通訊管理局（ECA）依據第1148/2019號公告頒發的強制性型式批准證書。ECA不接受CE、FCC和CCC批准。SRRC和NAL在埃塞俄比亞不具法律效力。型式批准須在進口或銷售前取得。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ECA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Ethiopia under Proclamation No. 1148/2019. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by ECA. A separate ECA type approval process must be completed before importation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第1148/2019号公告，ECA型式批准对于所有在埃塞俄比亚进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被ECA承认。须在进口前完成独立的ECA型式批准程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第1148/2019號公告，ECA型式批准對於所有在埃塞俄比亞進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被ECA承認。須在進口前完成獨立的ECA型式批准程序。
